description: Phase 1: Decompose the three largest loop_engine files (engine.rs 4525L, prompt.rs 3753L, env.rs 2688L) into focused single-responsibility modules. Mechanical extraction only — no behavior changes.

criteria: Rust: No warnings in `cargo check` output
Rust: No warnings in `cargo clippy` output
Rust: All tests pass with `cargo test`
Test count is identical before and after extraction (run `cargo test 2>&1 | grep 'test result'`)
No breaking changes to existing public APIs — re-export if necessary
Every new module file has a //! module doc comment
globalAcceptanceCriteria.description: These criteria apply to ALL implementation tasks

mergeStrategy: Merge to main after MILESTONE-FINAL passes. Squash commits optional.

priorityPhilosophy.description: The hierarchy of what matters most when implementing tasks
hierarchy: 1. PLAN - Map call graphs and test associations before moving any code
2. FUNCTIONING CODE - Extraction compiles and all existing tests pass
3. CORRECTNESS - No orphaned tests, no broken imports, identical test count
4. CODE QUALITY - Module doc comments, pub(crate) visibility, alphabetical mod declarations
5. POLISH - Clean up unused imports in source file after extraction
principles: Move complete call chains together — if A calls B, extract both to same module
Tests move with their tested functions — never orphan a test
Verify cargo test count before and after each extraction
Use pub(crate) for internal APIs, pub only for cross-crate visibility

priorityGuidelines.medium: 21-50: Fix in current phase if time permits

acceptanceCriteria: Run `cargo test 2>&1 | grep 'test result'` and record exact pass/fail/ignore counts in progress.txt
Run `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` and confirm zero warnings
Run `cargo fmt --check` and confirm clean
Document the current module count in src/loop_engine/mod.rs (currently 23 pub mod declarations)
List all test functions in engine.rs #[cfg(test)] module (starts at line 2323) — record count in progress.txt
Record baseline line counts: `wc -l src/loop_engine/engine.rs src/loop_engine/prompt.rs src/loop_engine/env.rs` in progress.txt
Audit constants: `grep -n 'const ' src/loop_engine/engine.rs src/loop_engine/prompt.rs src/loop_engine/env.rs` — record which constants are used by functions being extracted

Audit #[allow] annotations: `grep -n '#\[allow' src/loop_engine/engine.rs src/loop_engine/prompt.rs src/loop_engine/env.rs` — record any suppressed warnings that must be preserved in extracted modules
userStories.description: Before any extraction, capture the baseline test count and verify all checks pass. This creates the reference point for validating that no tests are lost during extractions.
edgeCases: Some tests may be #[ignore] — count those separately
Integration tests in tests/ directory must also be counted
Flaky tests that pass intermittently — run cargo test twice to confirm stable count

failureModes.cause: Test count changes between runs due to flaky tests
failureModes.expectedBehavior: Run 3 times, use consistent count; document any flaky tests

invariants: Total test count must not decrease after any extraction
Zero clippy warnings must be maintained throughout
userStories.notes: This is the pre-flight check. Every subsequent extraction must match this baseline test count exactly.
userStories.title: Baseline test count and verify pre-extraction state

acceptanceCriteria: git_reconcile.rs contains: reconcile_external_git_completions, check_git_for_task_completion, contains_task_id
git_reconcile.rs has //! module doc comment explaining its responsibility
Functions are pub(crate) in git_reconcile.rs (they need to be visible to engine.rs)
engine.rs imports from git_reconcile and calls them — no logic duplication
All associated tests (expected ~19, verify at extraction time) moved to git_reconcile.rs #[cfg(test)] module
mod.rs updated with `pub mod git_reconcile;` in alphabetical order
cargo test count matches baseline from TEST-INIT-001
cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
userStories.description: Move git-based task completion detection functions from engine.rs to a new src/loop_engine/git_reconcile.rs module. Functions: reconcile_external_git_completions (line 2015), check_git_for_task_completion (line 2174), contains_task_id (line 2140). These are all module-private (fn, not pub) and only called within engine.rs. Move their associated tests too (11 contains_task_id tests at lines 3792-3882+4143, 4 reconcile tests at 3310/3889/3947/4017, 4 git_completion tests at 3376/3390/3406/4073).
userStories.notes: contains_task_id is called by both reconcile_external_git_completions and check_git_for_task_completion — all three must move together. reconcile_external_git_completions also calls update_prd_task_passes — at extraction time this function still lives in engine.rs, so git_reconcile.rs should import it via `super::update_prd_task_passes` or `crate::loop_engine::engine::update_prd_task_passes`. After REFACTOR-003 moves it to prd_reconcile.rs, the import path will need updating — but that is REFACTOR-003's responsibility, not this task's. Also calls complete_cmd::complete from crate::commands::complete.

correctness: Test count identical before and after extraction
All 19 tests pass in their new location
No orphaned test helpers — if tests use setup_test_db or similar, ensure those are accessible
performance: No runtime impact — purely compile-time module reorganization
style: pub(crate) visibility for all extracted functions

userStories.title: Extract git reconciliation from engine.rs to git_reconcile.rs

Functions: strip_task_prefix (line 1913), parse_completed_tasks (line 1927), check_output_for_task_completion (line 1955), scan_output_for_completed_tasks (line 1969). All are module-private. Move their associated tests too (6 parse_completed tests at lines 4161-4203, 4 scan_output tests, 1 check_output test).
userStories.notes: scan_output_for_completed_tasks calls check_output_for_task_completion internally — they must stay together. strip_task_prefix is also called by update_prd_task_passes (moving to prd_reconcile in REFACTOR-003). Make strip_task_prefix pub(crate) so prd_reconcile can import it later. scan_output_for_completed_tasks uses rusqlite::Connection and prefix_and from crate::db.

userStories.description: Move PRD metadata and pass reconciliation functions from engine.rs to a new src/loop_engine/prd_reconcile.rs module. Functions: read_prd_metadata (line 1549), update_prd_task_passes (line 1723), mark_task_done (line 1789), reconcile_passes_with_db (line 1811), hash_file (line 2227). Move associated tests (1 test for update_prd_task_passes, 3 for reconcile_passes_with_db).
userStories.notes: update_prd_task_passes calls strip_task_prefix which now lives in output_parsing.rs (from REFACTOR-002). mark_task_done calls update_prd_task_passes (internal to this module) and complete_cmd::complete. reconcile_passes_with_db calls complete_cmd::are_dependencies_satisfied. IMPORTANT: read_prd_metadata returns a PrdMetadata struct — grep for 'struct PrdMetadata' to locate its definition. If defined in engine.rs: move it to prd_reconcile.rs and add re-export `pub(crate) use prd_reconcile::PrdMetadata` in engine.rs (or mod.rs) so existing callers still compile. After REFACTOR-003, update git_reconcile.rs import of update_prd_task_passes to point to prd_reconcile instead of engine.

userStories.description: Move worktree management functions from env.rs to a new src/loop_engine/worktree.rs module. Functions: cleanup_empty_dir (line 15), sanitize_branch_name (line 183), compute_worktree_path (line 196), is_inside_worktree (line 210), parse_worktree_list (line 233), ensure_worktree (line 280), remove_worktree (line 498). Move their associated tests (~35 worktree-related test functions spanning lines 2020-2688). Note: parse_worktree_list and remove_worktree are imported by commands/worktrees.rs — update that import path.
userStories.notes: External callers to update: (1) engine.rs line 879 env::ensure_worktree → worktree::ensure_worktree, (2) engine.rs line 1504 env::remove_worktree → worktree::remove_worktree, (3) batch.rs line 164 env::remove_worktree → worktree::remove_worktree, (4) commands/worktrees.rs line 13 import path change. ensure_worktree calls env::get_current_branch and env::prompt_user_yn — these stay in env.rs, so worktree.rs will need to import from env. Also document findings on commands/worktrees.rs overlap (minor — both invoke `git worktree list --porcelain` independently but share the parser).

userStories.description: Review all 5 extraction tasks for: correct visibility (pub/pub(crate)), no orphaned tests, no unused imports, module doc comments present, consistent patterns across all new modules, and integration wiring (all import paths updated).
userStories.notes: For each issue found: 1) Add a CODE-FIX-xxx task to the JSON (priority 14-16), 2) Add CODE-FIX-xxx to MILESTONE-1 dependsOn array, 3) Commit the JSON changes. Mark CODE-REVIEW-1 as passes:true once review is complete and all tasks are added.
userStories.title: Review all Phase 1 extractions for quality and correctness

acceptanceCriteria: No duplicated test helper code across new modules
Import graph is clean — no module imports from more than 3 sibling modules
Shared utilities (like prefix_and, test DB setup) are in appropriate shared locations
Any issues found have corresponding REFACTOR-1-xxx tasks added to JSON
userStories.description: Analyze the extracted modules for DRY violations, unnecessary coupling, and maintainability. Check: are there shared helpers that should be in a common location? Are test fixtures duplicated across new modules? Is the import graph clean (no tangled dependencies)?
userStories.notes: For each issue found: 1) Add a REFACTOR-1-xxx task to the JSON (priority 18-19), 2) Add REFACTOR-1-xxx to MILESTONE-1 dependsOn array, 3) Commit the JSON changes. If no issues found, mark passes:true with note 'No refactoring needed'.
userStories.reviewFindings: Found 2 actionable DRY violations: (1) git_reconcile.rs has 9 inline INSERT INTO runs calls instead of using test_utils::insert_run, plus prd_reconcile.rs has 1 test bypassing setup_test_db (missing run_migrations). (2) worktree.rs duplicates setup_git_repo with behavioral differences — needs a setup_git_repo_with_file variant in test_utils. Import graph is clean (strict DAG, no cycles, max 2 sibling imports per module).
userStories.title: Review extractions for refactoring opportunities

acceptanceCriteria: Read progress.txt for all Phase 1 learnings
Review each Phase 2 task and update notes/AC based on learnings (e.g., if pub(super) audit was important in P1, ensure P2 tasks mention it)
If Phase 1 created unexpected files or changed mod.rs structure, update P2 touchesFiles accordingly
Document which P2 tasks were updated and why in progress.txt
Commit updated P2 JSON: 'chore: LEARN-001 - Update P2 tasks with P1 learnings'
userStories.description: Review progress.txt and long-term-learnings.md for patterns discovered during Phase 1 extractions. Update tasks/large-file-refactor-p2.json to incorporate learnings: adjust notes, add edge cases discovered, update touchesFiles if Phase 1 changed file structure, refine acceptance criteria based on what worked/didn't work. Also update remaining Phase 1 tasks (INT-001, reviews) if needed.
userStories.notes: This task bridges phases — learnings from extraction patterns, visibility gotchas, test movement issues, and mod.rs conventions should flow forward to Phase 2.
userStories.title: Update Phase 2 tasks based on Phase 1 extraction learnings

acceptanceCriteria: git_reconcile.rs tests use test_utils::insert_run() instead of inline INSERT INTO runs
prd_reconcile.rs test_reconcile_passes_resolves_dependency_chains uses setup_test_db() instead of raw create_schema
All tests still pass with identical count
cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
userStories.description: git_reconcile.rs has 9 inline 'INSERT INTO runs' statements that should use test_utils::insert_run(). prd_reconcile.rs has one test (test_reconcile_passes_resolves_dependency_chains) that calls create_schema directly without run_migrations, diverging from setup_test_db() and risking silent migration misses.
userStories.notes: Straightforward find-and-replace. Add 'use crate::loop_engine::test_utils::insert_run;' to git_reconcile.rs test module and replace all 9 inline INSERT statements. For prd_reconcile.rs, replace the raw create_schema+open_connection with setup_test_db().
userStories.title: DRY: Use test_utils helpers in git_reconcile and prd_reconcile tests

acceptanceCriteria: test_utils.rs has a setup_git_repo_with_file() function that creates a repo with a committed file
worktree.rs tests use the new test_utils function instead of local setup_git_repo
All worktree tests still pass
cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
userStories.description: worktree.rs has a local setup_git_repo() (line 398) that duplicates test_utils::setup_git_repo() with two behavioral differences: uses -b main flag and commits a real file. Extract this as setup_git_repo_with_file() in test_utils and use it from worktree.rs tests.
userStories.notes: The behavioral differences are intentional (worktree tests need a real file to dirty). Add setup_git_repo_with_file() to test_utils that handles this variant, then update worktree.rs to import and use it.
userStories.title: DRY: Extract worktree.rs local setup_git_repo to test_utils
